disambiguated.context: It was a busy month in my apartment complex, and I got two new neighbors in the units above and below mine. One is gay and the other is pansexual. I usually check the sex offender registry right away when I get new neighbors, and when I when I looked up these two, I was shocked to see that the gay one was on the registry for assaulting a child under 12.
